projects.title: PayPlus Payments API
projects.subtitle: REST API Reference
projects.description: Complete REST API reference for a fictional enterprise payments platform. Covers authentication, ACH, RTP/FedNow, Fedwire, SWIFT, webhook events, and error handling — Stripe-style developer experience.

projects.title: PayPlus Admin Guide
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Administration
projects.description: End-to-end enterprise administration guide for the PayPlus platform. Covers installation, user and role management, payment rail configuration, compliance settings, and troubleshooting procedures.

projects.title: US Payments Hub
projects.subtitle: Operations & Compliance Reference
projects.description: Comprehensive operations reference covering all six US payment rails: ACH, Fedwire, RTP, FedNow, SWIFT, and Card. Includes 12 scenario walkthroughs, compliance checklists, and rail-by-rail decision guides.

projects.title: US ACH Processing Docs
projects.subtitle: Technical Deep Dive
projects.description: Detailed technical documentation for US ACH payment processing. Eight Markdown source files with diagrams covering transaction lifecycle, return codes, NOC handling, same-day ACH, and Nacha rules compliance.

projects.title: NICE Actimize Platform Docs
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Structured Authoring
projects.description: Full MadCap Flare enterprise documentation project for the NICE Actimize financial crime prevention platform. Covers Fraud, AML, ActimizeWatch, Cloud, DataIQ, ERCM, FMC, and more. 20+ build targets including HTML5, PDF, and Word.

projects.title: SunBridge Asset Atrium Manager
projects.subtitle: Investment Platform Docs
projects.description: Technical documentation site for an enterprise investment management platform. Covers system architecture, high-availability design, batch processing, multi-timezone operations, failover, audit, DB updates, and release governance.

projects.title: DocCraft AI
projects.subtitle: AI Documentation Generator
projects.description: Next.js 14 SaaS tool that uses GPT-4o to generate professional documentation from source files. Features 5 doc templates, MSTP compliance checking, inline AI editing, Mermaid diagram generation, and document history.

projects.title: PPT2Video API
projects.subtitle: PowerPoint to Narrated Video
projects.description: Python/FastAPI application that converts PowerPoint presentations into narrated MP4 videos using Azure Text-to-Speech and FFmpeg. REST API with job queue, async processing, and a polished dark-mode web interface.
